title: [W]Type of claim
h1: [W]What type of claim is the claimant making?
hint:
[W]You can choose all that apply to the claimant. Further information will be asked for later in the claim.

Select all that apply

discrimination.hint: [W]for example, because of the claimant's sex, ethnicity, disability or other characteristic

whistleBlowing.hint: [W]including dismissal or any other unfair treatment after whistleblowing

otherTypesOfClaims.explain: [W]Tell us briefly what type of claim the claimant is making. You can describe the details of the claim later.

otherClaim.required: [W]Tell us briefly what type of claim the claimant is making
